description.max_posts_per_site_daily: Maximum posts per site shown in the daily feed (prevents dominance)
description.diversity_boost: Boost factor for less active sites (0.0-1.0, higher = more diversity)
description.time_decay_hours: Hours for exponential time decay (lower = favor newer posts more)
description.randomization_factor: Amount of randomness to inject (0.0-1.0, higher = more random)
description.discovery_ratio: Ratio of discovery posts vs recent posts (0.0-1.0, higher = more discovery)
description.max_posts_main_page: Maximum posts to show on main page (prevents overwhelming users)
